सोलाफलायओवरकेपास, सोला, अहमदाबाद (गुजरात) – 380 060.

DIRECTORATE GENERAL OF GOODS & SERVICES
TAX INTELLIGENCE, ZONAL UNIT, AHMEDABAD
$ 6^{th} $ &  $ 7^{th} $ Floor, “I-the Address”, Opp. H.C.G. Hospital, Near Sola Flyover, Sola, Ahmedabad, Gujarat-380060 Fax : 079-29600116 Phone : 079-26477011
Alert Notice No. 10/2024-25

Sub: Alert Notice regarding availment/passing on of Input Tax Credit (ITC) on the strength of bogus invoices without any supply of corresponding goods to/from M/s Shakti Agro Chem & Fertilizers (GSTIN:24DKMPP4401F1ZB) -reg.

Intelligence/information was received from the DGGI, Zonal Unit, Ahmedabad that various suppliers/aggregators are involved in the diversion of Agriculture Grade Urea (AGU) for industrial use, leading to loss to Government exchequer. Further, it was informed that commodity viz. Technical Grade Urea (TGU) falls under HSN 3102 and attracts 18% GST, whereas Agriculture Grade Urea also fall under HSN 3102 and the same is taxable @5% in GST. Intelligence further revealed that these firms were also involved in bogus invoice transactions to claim fake Input Tax Credit.

2. An investigation is carried out against one such firm in the name of M/s. MH Acid and Chemicals, Rajkot which is found to be involved in the availment of fake ITC from the fake/non-existent firms and diversion of AGU to TGU. Also, it was observed that M/s. MH Acid and Chemicals, Rajkot had shown inward supplies of TGU from M/s. Shakti Agro Chem and Fertilizers (GSTIN: 24DKMPP4401F1ZB). Accordingly, an investigation was initiated against the above said supplier firm viz. M/s. Shakti Agro Chem and Fertilizers. The said firm was registered as proprietary firm of Smt. Ilaben Patel and had obtained the GST registration on 13.09.2017. The registration was cancelled suo-moto effective from 01.10.2018.
3. Working on the collected intelligence, DGGI, Zonal Unit, Ahmedabad conducted a search operation at the registered premises of M/s. Shakti

2017-18, which gets time barred shortly. Due care and prompt action is necessitated from the Jurisdictional Commissionerate in this regard.
7. This issues with the approval of the ADG, DGGI, AZU, Ahmedabad.

Signed by
Shyam Dadwal
Date: 15-07-2024 17:39:57

Ahmedabad.
The Pr. Commissioner/Commissioner, CGST & Central Excise Commissionerate-Ahmedabad North/Ahmedabad South/Rajkot/Kutch-Gandhidham/Gandhinagar/Vadodara-I &II/Mumbai-East/Surat/Thane.

DGGI, RRU, Rajkot

Annexure-A to the Alert Notice No. 10/2023-24 dated 15.07.2024 in case of M/s Shakti Agro Chem and Fertilizers (GSTIN: 24DKMPP4401F1ZB)
Sl. No.Description of evidences collectedRemarks
1Copy of Panchnama dated 25.05.2022, drawn at the registered premises of M/s Shakti Agro Chem and Fertilizers i.e. Shop no. 10, $ 2^{{nd}} $ floor, Radhey Corner, lal Gebi circle, S.P. Ring road, Hathijan, Ahmedabad.Found Non-existent
PANCHNAMA DRAWN AT M/s SHAKTI AGRO CHEM & FERTILIZER (GSTIN: 24DKMPP4401F1ZB) AT SHOP NO.10, 2nd FLOOR, RADHEY CORNER, LAL GEBI CIRCLE, S.P. RING ROAD, HATHIJAN, AHMEDABAD, 382445 ON 25/05/2022.

Sr. No.Name & Address of the PanchasAge (Years)Occupation
(1)Shri. Patel Atulbhai\nC-1, Shriji Colony, viratnagar road, odhav, odhav industrial estate, Ahmedabad-38241548Service
(2)Shri. Lalluvadia PragneshKumar Anantray, A-201, Platinum Enclave, Opp. Ayojan Nagar, S P Ring Road, Daskroi, Ahmedabad- 38244548Business

We, the above detailed persons, on being called upon by a person who introduces himself as Shri Navdeep Singh Sidhu, Intelligence Officer, Directorate General of GST Intelligence (DGGI), Ahmedabad Zonal Unit, Ahmedabad, present ourselves at Radhey Corner, Lal Gebi Circle, S.P. Ring Road, Hathijan, Ahmedabad, 382445. Shri Navdeep Singh Sidhu, IO informs us that a search in premise of M/s. Shakti Agro Chem & Fertilizer (GSTIN: 24DKMPP4401F1ZB) registered in GST at shop no. 10, 2ND Floor, Radhey Corner, Lal Gebi Circle, S.P. Ring Road, Hathijan, Ahmedabad, 382445, is to be conducted in the matter of evasion of Goods and Services Tax and shows us the Authorization for Search (GST-INS-01) bearing CBIC DIN –202205DWW30000000CA8 dated 25/05/2022 issued under Section-67(2) of the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017, by the Additional Director, DGGI, Ahmedabad Zonal Unit which is valid for 02 days for search at the above said address. The officer then requests us to witness the said search proceedings as independent Panchas and also requests us to remain present during entire search proceedings. We, give our consent to witness the said search proceedings as independent Panchas and agree to remain present at the premises till the completion of the entire search proceeding and we put our dated signature on the said Authorization for Search bearing CBIC DIN –202205DWW30000000CA8 dated 25/05/2022. Shri Navdeep Singh Sidhu, IO then introduces other accompanying officer as Shri Kopula Balakrishna, IO, DGGI-Ahmedabad Zonal Unit, Ahmedabad (hereinafter called as "the Officers" for brevity).
We both the panchas and the officers wearing masks and by maintaining proper social distance, arrive at the entrance of the registered  $ \uwave{\text{Before me,}} $

(Navdeep Singh Sidhu)
Intelligence Officer,

DGGI, Ahmedabad Zonal Unit
25/5/22

(Shri. Tejas P Jolapara)
P2-

business premise of M/s. Shakti Agro Chem & Fertilizer (GSTIN: 24DKMPP4401F1ZB) registered in GST at shop no. 10, 2ND Floor, Radhey Corner, Lal Gebi Circle, S.P. Ring Road, Hathijan, Ahmedabad, 382445 at 15:00 Hrs. On reaching the entrance of shop no. 10, 2ND Floor, Radhey Corner, Lal Gebi Circle, S.P. Ring Road, Hathijan, Ahmedabad, 382445 it is observed that a board with name of Vinayak Road Tech and GST No. 24AZBPJ0114C2ZC is affixed at the Shop as follows:

In presence of we the panchas, the officers knock at the door of the shop and a person comes forward and introduces himself as Shri. Tejas P Jolapara husband of proprietor of M/s. Vinayak Road Tech. The officers in presence of we the panchas inquire from Shri. Tejas P Jolapara about M/s. Shakti Agro Chem & Fertilizer (GSTIN: 24DKMPP4401F1ZB) and its owner Smt. Ilaben Patel, to which Shri. Tejas P Jolapara informs the officers that he has never heard of M/s. Shakti Agro Chem & Fertilizer, however Shri. Tejas P Jolapara informs the officers that he has taken the shop on rent from Shri. Ankit Patel, Before me,
(Shri. Tejas P Jolapara)

the son of Smt. Ilaben Patel since 1st April, 2022 but he has not executed the rent agreement yet. The officers then show Shri. Tejas P Jolapara Authorization for Search (GST-INS-01) bearing CBIC DIN -202205DWW30000000CA8 dated 25/05/2022 issued under Section-67(2) of the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017, by the Additional Director, DGGI, Ahmedabad Zonal Unit and as token of confirmation Shri. Tejas P Jolaparam puts his dated signature on Authorization for Search (GST-INS-01). The officers in presence of we the panchas offer their personal search to Shri. Tejas P Jolapara to which he declines politely. Upon asked by the officers to call the owner of the shop, Shri. Tejas P Jolapara (mobile no. 9879564583) calls Shri. Ankit Patel on mobile no. 8849022903 in presence of we the panchas and the officers, Shri. Ankit Patel attends the call and informs Shri. Tejas P Jolapara that he and his family including his mother Smt. Ilaben Patel and his father Shri. Chandrakant R Patel are out of Ahmedabad and cannot come at this moment. The officers then in presence of we the panchas check the registered premises of M/s. Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0114C2ZC) on GST network on the laptop brought by the officers and it is noticed that the principal place of business of M/s. Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0114C2) is B/32, Akshardham Ind Estate, under Ramol Bridge, Ramol GIDC Vatva, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, 382445 and no other additional place of business is registered in the registration details of M/s. Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0114C2ZC). The officers in presence of we the panchas inquire from Shri. Tejas P Jolapara as to why shop no. 10, 2ND Floor, Radhey Corner, Lal Gebi Circle, S.P. Ring Road, Hathijan, Ahmedabad, 382445 from where M/s. Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0114C2ZC) is currently being operated has not been shown in the registration details of M/s. Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0114C2ZC) to which Shri. Tejas P Jolapara informs the officers in presence of we the panchas that as the rent agreement has not been executed yet therefore he has not filed for amendment in the GST registration. In presence of we the panchas, the officers start the search of the shop however no documents related to M/s. Shakti Agro Chem & Fertilizer (GSTIN: 24DKMPP4401F1ZB) are found at the premises however some records related to M/s. Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0114C2ZC) and one more firm namely M/s. Vinayak Engineers having GST No. 24ABPPD1014M1ZW are recovered from the shop. The officers inquire about M/s. Vinayak Engineers from Shri. Tejas P Jolapara to which he replies that he was the proprietor of the firm M/s. Vinayak Engineers (GST No. 24ABPPD1014M1ZW) but as he has not filed the GST returns of the said firm, the GST registration of the firm M/s. Vinayak

Before me,
2505.2027
(Navdeep Singh Sidhu)
Intelligence Officer,
DGGI, Ahmedabad Zonal Unit
(Shri. Tejas P Jolapara)

Engineers (GST No. 24ABPPD1014M1ZW) was cancelled by the GST department. The officers in presence of we the panchas also recover two invoices pertaining to firm M/s. Sabarmati Fertilizer and Chemicals Industries Private Limited (24AAYCS3916Q1ZE) having registered premises at shop no. 10, 2ND Floor, Radhey Corner, Lal Gebi Circle, S.P. Ring Road, Hathijan, Ahmedabad, 382445 issued by M/s. Mitachem Pulveriser Industries and M/s. SGS India Private Limited. The officers in presence of we the panchas inquire from Shri. Tejas P Jolapara about M/s. Sabarmati Fertilizer and Chemicals Industries Private Limited (24AAYCS3916Q1ZE) to which he replies that he is not aware of M/s. Sabarmati Fertilizer and Chemicals Industries Private Limited (24AAYCS3916Q1ZE). The officers in presence of we the panchas under the reasonable belief that the documents related to M/s. Vinayak Road Tech (GSTIN 24AZBPJ0114C2ZC), M/s. Vinayak Engineers (GST No. 24ABPPD1014M1ZW) and M/s. Sabarmati Fertilizer and Chemicals Industries Private Limited (24AAYCS3916Q1ZE) may be useful for further investigation withdraw the records pertaining to the three firms recovered from shop no. 10, 2ND Floor, Radhey Corner, Lal Gebi Circle, S.P. Ring Road, Hathijan, Ahmedabad, 382445 under Panchnama proceedings. The said documents are seized by the officers in presence of we the panchas as detailed in Form GST INS-02.

This Panchnama has been recorded as per our say and version with our consent in laptop and printer of the officers. No untoward incidence happened during the course of the entire Panchnama proceedings and nobody's religious feelings were hurt and the entire search proceedings were carried out in a very peaceful and cordial manner. All the facts and figures narrated in this Panchnama are true and correct and all the contents of the Panchnama have been explained to us in the local language and in token of its correctness we the Panchas put our dated signature in all the pages of this Panchnama. Shri. Tejas P Jolapara puts his dated signature on all the pages of this panchnama. We the above detailed Panchas, all the Officers and Shri. Tejas P Jolapara remain present during the entire course of Panchnama proceedings. After completion of Panchnama proceedings and before leaving the premises all the officers and we the Panchas offer for personal search to Shri. Tejas P Jolapara to which he politely declines. During the panchnama proceedings all protocol related to pandemic Covid-19 has been followed. The Panchnama proceedings commenced at 15:00 Hrs. on 25/05/2022 and concluded at 21:30 Hrs. on the same day i.e., 25/05/2022.

Before me,
(Navdeep Singh Sidhu)
Intelligence Officer,
DGGI, Ahmedabad Zonal Unit

(Shri. Tejas P Jolapara)

FORM GST INS-02
ORDER OF SEIZURE
[See Rule 139(2)]

Whereas a search under sub-section (2) of Section 67 was conducted by me starting from 25.05.2022 started at 03.00 PM at the premise of M/s. Shakti Agro Chem & Fertilizer (GSTIN: 24DKMPP4401F1ZB) located at shop no. 10, 2ND Floor, Radhey Corner, Lal Gebi Circle, S.P. Ring Road, Hathijan, Ahmedabad, 382445.
